summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: full geometric derivation of ad-bc. Enclosing (a+b)×(c+d) BLUE rectangle with 6 colored subtracted regions: 2 MAROON ac/2 triangles, 2 TEAL bd/2 triangles, 2 PINK bc rectangles; YELLOW central parallelogram is ad-bc. Reveals additive decomposition (a+b)(c+d) - 2ac - 2bd - 2bc = ad-bc. a=3, b=1.5, c=0.5, d=2.
